story.text:
# Wiki See Section

**Category** wikis · **Version** 5.5

Writing or tidying the `## See` section of a federated wiki page — grouping related wikilinks together on compact lines rather than one link per bullet. Part of the git-less onboarding/distribution layer kept by the Librarian 🗃️ in the Tower's Wikis.

The **fedwiki-see-section** skill — Write or tidy the `## See` section of a federated wiki page. Groups related wikilinks together on compact lines rather than one link per bullet.

## When it Triggers

Use when the user says "tidy the see section", "compact the see links", "group the see section", or when writing a new page and choosing how to format its See section.

## What it Does

- The Pattern
- Grouping Strategy
- Example
- Full item JSON
- When Writing a New Page

## See

- Claude Skills and Fedwiki Document Skill
- Claude Import Skill

**Upstream:** [`fedwiki-seesection-skill`](https://skill.fedwiki.club/view/welcome-visitors/view/fedwiki-seesection-skill) — vendored + re-framed (owner: Anon / 'from marvin', skill.fedwiki.club). The wiki page remains the source of truth; this SKILL.md is a fork carrying its lineage.

**Verify:** [agentprivacy.ai](https://agentprivacy.ai) · [skill.fedwiki.club](https://skill.fedwiki.club)

## Provenance
Forkable skill page migrated from the agentprivacy skills repo (`persona/agentprivacy-wiki-see-section`, v5.5).
Source of truth: `agentprivacy-skills-v5`. Fork this page to materialize a local `SKILL.md` via `fedwiki-to-skill`.

*origin: 0xagentprivacy · author: Mitchell Travers*
